name: Mediterranean Spring Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in boiling salted water for about 25 minutes or until tender. Drain well and cool slightly.
2. Peel the potatoes and thinly slice them. Place in a shallow bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, combine oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, and salt. Mix well.
4. Pour the mixture over the sliced potatoes and marinate for 1 hour.
5. Drain the potatoes, reserving the marinade.
6. Place salad greens in a large bowl.
7. Arrange the potatoes, tomato wedges, green pepper rings, onion rings, cucumber slices, feta cheese crumbles, and anchovies (if desired) over the salad greens.
8. Serve with the reserved marinade.
